---
title: "Christian Karl Bernhard von Tauchnitz, Baron von Tauchnitz"
---

## Christian Karl Bernhard von Tauchnitz, Baron von Tauchnitz

**Dates:** (1841-1904)

### Description

publisher of English books in Leipzig, son of [[person:1396]Christian Bernhard, Baron von Tauchnitz]

### Letters

- Letter from  the 2d of June,  1893
- Letter from May 22d 1889
- Letter from Feb 19th 1889

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
